output.campaign_name: Get Your Deposit Back: Problem-Aware Short-Form Campaign

hooks.hook_text: POV: Your landlord is ghosting you and your $2,000 deposit is gone 😤
hooks.script: You moved out, left the place spotless, and now your landlord is ignoring your texts. Stop begging. You need a formal demand letter that scares them into paying. Deposits-Back.com writes one for you in 60 seconds for just $19.99. No sign-up, no subscription. Get your money back.
hooks.visual_suggestion: Close-up of unanswered text messages, then cut to user typing on laptop with the Deposits-Back.com interface.
hooks.cta: Generate your letter now at Deposits-Back.com for $19.99—60 seconds, no account needed.

hooks.hook_text: They charged you $500 for a 'scuff mark' 👀
hooks.script: Your landlord can't deduct normal wear and tear from your deposit, but they will try. Don't let them. Fire back with a legally sound dispute letter in under a minute. Go to Deposits-Back.com. $19.99. 60 seconds. No account needed. Get what's yours.
hooks.visual_suggestion: Show a fake deduction list with absurd charges, then a red stamp that says 'DISPUTED' over the letter.
hooks.cta: Dispute bogus charges today at Deposits-Back.com—$19.99, done in 60 seconds.

hooks.hook_text: Your landlord has 30 days… it's day 31. Now what? ⏰
hooks.script: If your state deadline passed and you still have no deposit, it's time to escalate. Stop stressing and start demanding. Deposits-Back.com creates a professional demand letter instantly. $19.99, 60 seconds, zero sign-up. Visit the link now.
hooks.visual_suggestion: Calendar pages flipping fast past the due date, then screen recording of the 60-second letter generator.
hooks.cta: Don't wait another day. Visit Deposits-Back.com and send your demand letter in 60 seconds for $19.99.

hooks.hook_text: I got my full deposit back with one email 📧✅
hooks.script: I didn't hire a lawyer. I didn't go to court. I used Deposits-Back.com to send a demand letter that actually worked. 60 seconds, 19 bucks, no subscription. If your landlord stole your deposit, fight back today.
hooks.visual_suggestion: Split screen: left side shows 'Before' with $0 returned, right side shows 'After' with deposit refunded notification.
hooks.cta: Get your deposit back at Deposits-Back.com. $19.99, 60 seconds, no sign-up.

hooks.hook_text: They legally CAN'T keep this from your deposit 🚫💰
hooks.script: Unpaid rent? Sure. But cleaning fees for a move-out? Nope. Know your rights, then enforce them. Generate a state-specific demand letter at Deposits-Back.com in 60 seconds. Just $19.99 and no sign-up required. Get your deposit back now.
hooks.visual_suggestion: List of illegal deductions with a big red X over each, followed by a PDF preview of the generated letter.
hooks.cta: Know your rights and demand your money at Deposits-Back.com—$19.99, no subscription.

content_brief.title: Landlord Withholding Your Security Deposit? Here's How to Fight Back in 60 Seconds
content_brief.meta_description: Is your landlord withholding your security deposit? Learn your tenant rights and generate a legal demand letter in 60 seconds for only $19.99—no sign-up needed.
content_outline: Why landlords withhold security deposits (and when it's illegal)
What your landlord can and cannot deduct
State deadlines: How long does a landlord have to return your deposit?
How to write a security deposit dispute letter that works
The fastest way to demand your deposit back: Deposits-Back.com
key_points: Most states require landlords to return deposits within 14-60 days
Normal wear and tear cannot be deducted
A formal demand letter is the fastest way to escalate before small claims court
Deposits-Back.com generates letters in 60 seconds for $19.99 with no subscription
content_brief.cta: Stop waiting. Generate your deposit demand letter now at Deposits-Back.com for just $19.99—takes 60 seconds, no sign-up required.
content_brief.target_audience: Frustrated US renters whose landlords are withholding, delaying, or wrongfully deducting their security deposit
